summary: Completed frontend testing of Next.js + Supabase admin system. Critical authentication issues found preventing admin access. Main application features working correctly.

critical_bugs.issue: Invalid API key error preventing all authentication and database operations
critical_bugs.error_message: Invalid API key, hint: Double check your Supabase `anon` or `service_role` API key
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks all admin functionality, user authentication, and data loading

authentication_issues.issue: Admin routes (/admin) redirect to homepage instead of login due to Supabase API key error
Login form (/auth/login) redirects to homepage, preventing user authentication
authentication_issues.impact: Users cannot log in to access admin or user features

ui_bugs.issue: Next.js Image components missing 'sizes' prop and 'priority' for LCP optimization

integration_issues.issue: Agendamento page shows 'Erro ao carregar comunidades' due to Supabase API authentication failure

passed_tests: Navigation between Início, Agendamento, and Marketplace works
Agendamento page renders with community selection interface
Marketplace page loads with product categories and search functionality
Responsive design works on mobile viewport (768x1024)
Admin authentication redirect logic works (redirects to login when not authenticated)
UI components and styling render correctly with shadcn/ui
action_item_for_E1: CRITICAL: Fix Supabase API key configuration in .env.local file. The current API key is invalid, preventing all authentication and database operations. Once fixed, re-test admin authentication and functionality.

working_features: Main homepage with statistics and call-to-action buttons
Navigation menu with all required links
Agendamento page with community selection (Paraisópolis, Heliópolis)
Marketplace page with categories and product search
Admin route protection (correctly redirects when not authenticated)
broken_features: All admin CRUD operations (users, appointments, communities)
